channel.title: Abouts on Dmytro Shved

item.title: About
item.author: d.shved.wrk@gmail.com (Dmytro Shved)
item.description:
About

I’m a Backend developer passionate about solving complex problems and building projects with clean, readable, and easily scalable code.
item.content:encoded:
About

I’m a Backend developer passionate about solving complex problems and building projects with clean, readable, and easily scalable code.
